---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What would you like to see?**
Describe the feature or improvement.

**Which system does this affect?**
- [ ] Blender addon (surreal_arch)
- [ ] Geometry Nodes (melodia_gn)
- [ ] Unreal Engine (MelodiaCore / materials / PCG)
- [ ] Live Bridge / Material Bridge
- [ ] NPC / Voice pipeline
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tools / Scripts

**Why is this valuable?**
Explain the impact for designers, artists, or players.
